name: DW · CRM Activity
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS activity_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('ACEMP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 300)      AS employee_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('ACLEAD'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 3000)    AS lead_id,
    (ARRAY['Call','Email','Meeting','Demo','Note','Task'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('ACTYPE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)] AS activity_type,
    (ARRAY['Completed','Completed','Completed','Scheduled','Cancelled'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('ACSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)] AS status,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('ACDATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 540)::int) AS activity_date,
    (('x'||substr(md5('ACDUR'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 120) + 5      AS duration_minutes
FROM generate_series(1, 8000) AS gs
